query_normalized: anyflow: any-step video diffusion model with on-policy flow map distillation computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it investigates the exact same core mechanism ("On-Policy Distillation" applied to "Flow Matching" models) and proposes a foundational methodological framework for this specific intersection of techniques, which is the primary subject of the user's question. Although the candidate paper focuses on text-to-image models while the user's title mentions video, the shared algorithmic novelty (On-Policy Flow Map Distillation) makes it a canonical reference
